title: K blocks
description: You are given a sequence A of N positive integers. Let’s define “value of a splitting” the sequence to K blocks as a sum of maximums in each of K blocks. For given K find the minimal possible value of splittings.
input: First line of the input file contains two integers N and K. Next line contains N integers A1, A2, . . . , AN (1 ≤ Ai ≤ 106) — the sequence elements.
output: Output one number — minimal possible value of a splittings.
source: Olympiad, International Zhautykov Olympiad, IZhO 2014, yclock
